iterations_detail.changes: Compressed SKILL.md from 472 to ~100 lines. Removed verbose reference sections. Added focused log parsing pattern with query string stripping guidance. Added code refactoring patterns. Removed Python regex_tester.py script.
Adjusted var→let/const guidance to be more conservative — default to let, only const for explicitly named variables.
Made var→const rule even more explicit: only use const for task-named variables, everything else gets let.
Added concrete example showing var valid → let valid (not const). Model still uses const valid.
Tried more literal var/const guidance. regex-extract variance from small model. Reverted to iteration 1 skill version.

changes_summary: Compressed SKILL.md from 472 lines to ~100 lines focused on practical patterns
Added explicit log line parsing regex with capture groups
Added query string stripping guidance (split on ? take first part)
Added escaped quote handling guidance for log messages
Added type conversion reminder (parseInt for status/duration)
Added code refactoring patterns (line removal, equality fixes, whitespace)
Removed 462-line Python regex_tester.py script (not needed for tasks)
var→let/const guidance added but model has strong prior for const on never-reassigned vars
notes: regex-replace consistently scores 95/100 — the model uses const for 'valid' variable despite guidance to use let. This is a strong model prior that cannot be overridden via skill content. regex-extract scores 94-100 with variance typical of small models.
